problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Hydrogel. Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
